0.text: Patchy nodular densities in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

1.text: Patchy nodular densities in the lateral and medial segments of the right middle lobe

2.text: Patchy nodular densities in all segments of the right lower lobe

3.text: Tree-in-bud appearance of densities in the right lung

4.text: Patchy nodular densities in the lower lobes of the left lung

5.text: Tree-in-bud appearance of densities in the lower lobes of the left lung
